title: corybas cymatilis
intro: Corybas cymatilis, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a unique type of orchid that grows in the ground rather than on trees like most other orchids. Traditionally, the corybas cymatilis plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the corybas cymatilis plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
